message:
fix: Dictionary key type classification and comprehension scope isolation

- Add getDictKeyType() to type_traits for proper HashMap selection:
  - .int: AutoHashMap(i64, V) for integer keys
  - .string: StringHashMap(V) for string keys
  - .pyvalue: StringHashMap(PyValue) for unknown/mixed keys

- Fix dict comprehensions and literals to use 3-way key type classification
  instead of binary isIntegral() check

- Fix Python 3 comprehension scope isolation: comprehension loop variables
  (__comp_*) now properly shadow local variables of the same name

- Remove debug print statement from assign.zig
